' > b.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/md-structure.sh" --rule g-md-fenced-code-language-declared --root . --paths b.md --json > md.sarif 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in md.sarif 2>/dev/null; lax=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in md.sarif --strict 2>/dev/null; strict=$?; [ "$lax" -eq 0 ] && [ "$strict" -eq 1 ] && echo strict-gate-ok 1>&2
